prompt_queue.prompt: Industry: music and audio. Generate one distinct, buildable store concept for music and audio products. Examples of valid sub-spaces: vintage hi-fi restoration, modular synth and Eurorack accessories, niche instrument luthiery, drum hardware, cassette and tape culture, DJ tooling for a specific genre, headphones and IEMs for studio use, field recording, classical sheet music and accessories, vinyl pressing or care. Stay inside music and audio; do not drift into pure media production software or general electronics.
